lever: bit-packed Bool LiteralBuffer storage with direct same-shape F64 compare emission
baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY=1 RCH_PRIORITY=normal RCH_TEST_SLOTS=1 RCH_BUILD_SLOTS=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RUSTFLAGS,RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE,RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY,RCH_PRIORITY,RCH_TEST_SLOTS,RCH_BUILD_SLOTS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-prbo6-baseline cargo bench -j 1 -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/(lt_same_shape_1024x1024_f64|reduce_and_64k_bool_vec|select_1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
candidate2_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY=1 RCH_PRIORITY=normal RCH_TEST_SLOTS=1 RCH_BUILD_SLOTS=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RUSTFLAGS,RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE,RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY,RCH_PRIORITY,RCH_TEST_SLOTS,RCH_BUILD_SLOTS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-prbo6-candidate2 cargo bench -j 1 -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/(lt_same_shape_1024x1024_f64|reduce_and_64k_bool_vec|select_1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
score_reason: candidate2 regressed the target comparison row and adjacent Bool consumer rows; source changes restored

behavior_proof.ordering_preserved: yes; tests verified row-major Bool order across word boundaries
behavior_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: yes; Bool values have no tie-breaking policy
behavior_proof.floating_point: comparison operand order and primitive comparison semantics preserved in proof tests, including NaN, signed zero, and infinities

next_route: fuse compare masks into word-mask consumers instead of storage-only packing
